nodes.label: Vendor Code Splitting Strategy
nodes.rationale: Split vendor code into dedicated chunks: react-vendor (react, react-dom, react-router-dom) and chart-vendor (chart.js + peers). Keeps react cacheable across deploys; chart.js only downloads on routes that render charts.

nodes.label: Vite Dev Proxy
nodes.rationale: Proxy /api and /ws to localhost:3000 in local dev to mirror nginx behavior in prod where FE and BE share origin. Avoids CORS in dev without changing code.
